connection.title: Kaltura Connection
connection.chooseAccount: Choose a Kaltura account to connect
connection.connectPrompt: Sign in to your Kaltura account
connection.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
connection.noAccounts: No accounts found for this user.
connection.switchError: Please sign in again to switch accounts.

login.signupPrompt: Don't have an account? Sign up free
login.signupVerify: After verifying your email, sign in here.
login.signupSuccess: Account created? Sign in with your new credentials below.

upload.title: Upload to Kaltura
upload.success: Your recording is now available in Kaltura

browse.title: Load from Kaltura
browse.connectPrompt: Connect to browse your video library
browse.selectPrompt: Select a video from your library
browse.selectionHint: Double-click a video to select and load it into the editor
